{{Quote|Buan ke Shia challenges Waj Antilles! Answer!|Buan ke Shia to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="X-Wing: SOA" />}}
'''Buan ke Shia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]]  [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]] who challenged [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to a duel upon [[Red Flight]]'s—a group composed of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] veterans—diplomatic visit to the planet. He and his entire flight were shot down by Red Flight.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
